untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar swing analysis (identifying two distinct bottoms at similar price levels and the resistance level between them). This requires custom pattern recognition logic not available in the standard indicator set. The 'confirmation line' (resistance between bottoms) cannot be derived from allowed indicators without additional context or user input. Approximated entry as 'close crosses above r1' (pivot resistance) as a proxy, but this does not capture the true Double Bottom mechanics.
translation_notes: Signal requires explicit pattern detection: (1) identification of two swing lows at approximately equal price; (2) calculation of intermediate resistance (confirmation line); (3) breakout confirmation above that resistance. Standard indicators alone cannot reliably detect this without additional pattern-matching logic. Used r1 (first pivot resistance) as a placeholder for the confirmation line, but this is a significant simplification. Author notes 22% target may be too far—no explicit exit rule provided, so reversal condition used. Success rate in bull markets: 78%. Failure rate (reversals within 5%): 5%.
